LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF BREX INC'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL. PLAINTIFF BREX INC.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE DISMISSAL DATED NOVEMBER 18, 2025 IS GRANTED. BREX HAS SHOWN THAT THE DISMISSAL WAS THE RESULT OF THE MISTAKE, INADVERTENCE AND/OR EXCUSABLE NEGLECT OF ITS COUNSEL. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE DISMISSAL IS VACATED AND THE CASE IS RESTORED TO THE CIVIL ACTIVE LIST. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING. VISITING JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (301/HEK)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Dismissal; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Ron Chow; And [Proposed] Orde
Off Calendar Mar-02-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BREX INC'S Motion To Set Aside Dismissal

Plaintiff Brex Inc.'s motion to set aside the dismissal dated November 18, 2025 is granted. Brex has shown that the dismissal was the result of the mistake, inadvertence and/or excusable neglect of its counsel. No opposition filed. The dismissal is vacated and the case is restored to the civil active list.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/HEK)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2025 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk: D. Diaz; Not reported. (610)

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion to enforce settlement agreement is granted. Plaintiff is directed to submit a proposed judgment but shall first submit it to defendant pursuant to Rule of Court 3.1312.
